revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:11世紀日本の人物]] [[ar:Category:يابانيون في القرن 11]] [[es:Category:Japoneses del siglo XI]] [[fa:Category:اهالی ژاپن در سده ۱۱ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité japonaise du XIe siècle]] [[gpe:Category:11th-century Japanese people]] [[it:Category:Giapponesi dell'XI secolo]] [[ka:Category:XI საუკუნის იაპონელები]] [[ko:Category:11세기 일본 사람]] [[ro:Category:Japonezi din secolul al XI-lea]] [[sv:Category:Personer i Japan under 1000-talet]] [[tr:Category:11. yüzyılda Japonlar]] [[vi:Category:Người Nhật thế kỷ 11]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Abe no Seimei]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q24284981)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=11th-century_Japanese_people here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
